revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''1-1-080

Permanently available apparatus specially designed to be brought easily into service if the normal equipment fails. It may often be brought into service automatically. It usually provides an adequate replacement for the normal service equipment.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Stand-by apparatus}}
